headline: Kobe Bryant On How Elon Musk Inspired Him: 'A Genius By All Accounts'
summary: Basketball legend Kobe Bryant expressed deep admiration for Elon Musk, often sharing how the billionaire served as a source of inspiration for him.

summary: NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal once faced a credit card decline during a record-setting shopping spree at Walmart.

summary: Apple is gearing up for a significant overhaul of its iPhone lineup, with plans for major redesigns over the next three years.

summary: Powell's dovish Jackson Hole tone, mixed WMT/TGT/TJX earnings, and an AI hangover led by PLTR's slide gave way to a late-week risk rally.

headline: Mark Cuban's Simple Career Tip For The AI Era: 'Be Nice. Smile'
summary: Billionaire Mark Cuban encourages young professionals to have a positive attitude and smile as AI changes employment.

headline: European Postal Services Halt US Shipments As Trump Administration Ends 'De Minimis' Loophole For All Imports
summary: European postal services have suspended shipments to the U.S. due to the expiration of a duty-free exemption on low-value packages.

headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Admits Firing Engineers For Not Embracing AI Tools
summary: Coinbase CEO enforces strict AI adoption policy, firing engineers for not using AI tools. AI is seen as crucial for efficiency, innovation.

headline: Trump Names Sergio Gor Ambassador To India As Trade Tensions, Russia Oil Dispute Escalate
summary: President Donald Trump nominated longtime aide Sergio Gor as U.S. Ambassador to India amid diplomatic tensions.

headline: Trump Taps Airbnb Co-Founder Joe Gebbia As 1st Chief Design Officer To Overhaul Federal Digital Services
summary: Trump appointed Airbnb co-founder Joe Gebbia as the US's first Chief Design Officer to revamp federal websites and public spaces by 2026.

headline: Elon Musk's xAI Offers Up To $440K For Infrastructure Engineers, Calls It 'Adventure Of A Lifetime'
summary: Elon Musk's xAI is hiring infrastructure engineers for its supercomputing division, offering roles with salaries up to $440k.

headline: Applovin Stock Rises 3.1% After Key Trading Signal
